title: A Newspaper Is Raided and a Rights Group Outlawed Amid Kremlin Crackdown
summary_full: As Moscow throttles Russia’s few remaining independent voices, the authorities targeted two of the most prominent, one a Nobel Peace Prize winner and the other headed by a Nobel laureate.
summary_public: As Moscow throttles Russia’s few remaining independent voices, the authorities targeted two of the most prominent, one a Nobel Peace Prize winner and the other headed by a Nobel laureate.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Kremlin Crackdown...authorities targeted two of the most prominent
